title: Fix: not_configured: OPENROUTER_API_KEY not s

explanation: This recommendation targets "Fix: not_configured: OPENROUTER_API_KEY not s". Root cause identified: Required credential or environment variable is missing from the runtime configuration. The pattern is supported by 2 lesson(s) in the knowledge base, most recently: "Recurring failure: not_configured: OPENROUTER_API_KEY not s". Confidence is 36% — evidence is limited; treat this as a hypothesis requiring investigation.
